title: helichrysum subglobosum
intro: Helichrysum subglobosum is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South Africa, known for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The plant's extracts and essential oils have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum subglobosum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum subglobosum can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
